commentaries.author: Ambrosiaster
commentaries.content: This means that a weak brother cannot say that he is not a part of the body simply because he is not strong. Commentary on Paul’s Epistles.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: If the foot By this comparison St. Paul teaches the Corinthians, that as all cannot exercise the same functions in the Church, so no one should be envious of his brother; but that by their mutual charity, co-operation, union of hearts, and faith, they should compose one body, of which Christ is the head. (Calmet)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
